title: Elf deals triple attack damage to winged target

card.rawText: This creature inflicts 3x Atk damage to any creature with wings.

plan.title: Elf deals triple attack damage to winged target
plan.summary: Elf attacks a creature tagged with wings and its attack damage is multiplied by 3 during damage calculation.

notes: Set player_2 primary to a creature with hasWings tag, AL low enough for hit to land, and 50 HP.
Ensure not in first turn cycle. Elf base modifier +1 makes base attack damage 5 before multiplier.

steps: Player 1 attacks winged primary with Elf.
Inspect damage event and defender HP.
manualVerification: Confirm multiplier applies to final attack damage after attack die plus modifier.
Confirm same attack against non-winged target does not multiply.
riskNotes: Requires canonical target card has hasWings tag; missing data tag would look like effect failure.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Supported damage pipeline; verify target tag and multiplier ordering.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
